    Method
    Description
    ACL
    AccessService.create(int token, ACL acl)
    Creates a new ACL.
    ACL
    AccessService.find(int token, String name)
    Finds an existing ACL by it's name.

    Deprecated.
    use getAclList() instead

    Updates an existing ACL.
